title: Recreating Wakanda by promoting Black excellence in ecology and evolution.
author_string: Schell, Christopher J, Guy, Cylita, Shelton, Delia S, Campbell-Staton, Shane C, Sealey, Briana A et al.
abstract: Our non-Black colleagues must fight anti-Black racism and white supremacy within the academy to authentically promote Black excellence. Amplifying Black excellence in ecology and evolution is the antidote for white supremacy in the academy.
